title: Minior Overhaul
description: Overhauls Cobblemon Mega Showdown's Minior by giving it walking, running, flying, attacking, and sleeping animations. Now, Minior can even ride on your shoulder!
body:
## **Minior Overhaul**

Do you like Minior? If so, then this is the addon for you! This unofficial data/resource pack completely overhauls the Cobblemon Mega Showdown mod's Minior's textures, animations, and poses! Now, you can witness the 8 colors of Minior attacking, recoiling, fainting, sleeping, sprinting, flying, and letting out a battle cry, in all their animated glory!

- I also made "red" core Minior ACTUALLY red. Make of that what you will.

### **Installation**

For this pack to work as intended, you gotta put the .zip file in both your instance's "resourcepacks" folder and your world's save's "datapacks" folder.

### **Spawn Changes**
- Blue Core Minior spawns in Cold Biomes
- Indigo Core Minior spawns in Ocean and Beach Biomes.

### **Shoulder Effects**
- Putting Minior on your shoulder DISTORTS GRAVITY, giving you the [Jump Boost](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Jump_Boost) and [Slow Falling](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Slow_Falling) potion effects! Just make sure to dismount Minior from your shoulder before you leave the server.
